---
title: "IBM Neuro-Symbolic AI Summer School Day 1: ULKB Logic Language (Guilherme Lima)"
description: "Typed lambda-calculus with logical connectives and quantifiers, HOL kernel, easy Python interface."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-08-11"
categories: [NLP, NLU, knowledge graphs, conference]
image: cover.jpg
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![IBM Neuro-Symbolic AI Summer School 2022. Image from [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](cover.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](02.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](03.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](04.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](05.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](06.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](07.jpg)

![Slide from the [IBM Research](https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/).](08.jpg)
:::
IBM NeuroSymbolicAI Summer School 2022 Day 1:  ULKB (Universal Logic Knowledge Base) Logic Language given by Guilherme Lima:

* Typed lambda-calculus with equality plus logical connectives (negation, and, or, conditional, biconditional) and quantifiers (exists, for all)

* Has expressions (terms, formulas, types), annotations, and theories (axioms, theorems, definitions)

* HOL (Higher Order Logic) kernel supports substitution, reduction and inference rules.

* Easy to use Python interface.

Summer School site: <https://ibm.github.io/neuro-symbolic-ai/events/ns-summerschool2022/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_ibm-neurosymbolicai-logic-activity-6963530891566493696-TKjX).*
